ranked_hypotheses.title: YAP-BRD4 Condensate Size Supralinear Encoding
ranked_hypotheses.top_strength: Impact: quantitative switch model for fibrosis threshold (9/10)
ranked_hypotheses.top_weakness: Groundedness: condensates in fibroblast/hydrogel context unverified

ranked_hypotheses.title: MRTF-A Preferential CaRG-Box Mechanoenhancer Occupancy
ranked_hypotheses.top_strength: Falsifiability: CaRG-specific vs TEAD-specific H3K27ac loss = clean internal control (9/10)
ranked_hypotheses.top_weakness: Dropped 'enhancer preference' claim; core occupation test remains valid

ranked_hypotheses.title: Piezo1→CaMKII→HDAC4/5→EP300 Rapid Pre-Priming
ranked_hypotheses.top_strength: Impact: ion channels as chromatin regulators; temporal pre-priming concept (8/10)
ranked_hypotheses.top_weakness: Mechanistic route requires revision (CaMKII indirect via HDAC4/5)

ranked_hypotheses.title: KDM6B→EP300 Sequential Epigenetic Relay
ranked_hypotheses.top_strength: Testability: CUT&RUN time course with clear knockdown control (8/10)
ranked_hypotheses.top_weakness: Groundedness: H3K27me3 at mechanoenhancers in fibroblasts unverified (critical false premise)

ranked_hypotheses.title: Phase-Separated YAP Condensates Mediate Looping-Independent E-P Contacts
ranked_hypotheses.top_strength: Novelty+Impact: addresses major anomaly (86.2% looping-independent); highest novelty (9/10)
ranked_hypotheses.top_weakness: Mechanistic specificity: 5 competing alternatives; verteporfin mechanism wrong; condensates in fibroblasts unverified

minor_overlaps.overlap: Both test YAP condensates at mechanoenhancers
minor_overlaps.concern: resolved by ranking — H5 at #5, not co-selected with H3

diversity_check.top3_diversity: HIGH — three distinct mechanistic classes: condensate biophysics (H3), TF binding (H4), ion channel kinase (H2)

ranker_notes.score_clustering: All 5 hypotheses within 0.75 pts — cohesive set, no dominant outlier
ranker_notes.h3_note: Leads on Impact (9) — quantitative switch model is paradigm-level if confirmed
ranker_notes.h4_note: Leads on Falsifiability (9) — cleanest experimental design; publishable regardless of outcome
ranker_notes.h5_note: Highest Novelty (9) but low Groundedness+Testability after critique; requires most preliminary work
ranker_notes.h1_note: Bivalency prerequisite test (H3K27me3 CUT&RUN on soft ECM fibroblasts) would resolve core uncertainty rapidly
